headline: School Buildings at Risk: 1,200 Structures Could Fail
context: Education Ministry audit found 1,200 school buildings classified as high-risk for structural failure affecting 480,000 students.

cards.big: 1,200 school buildings at risk of failure affecting 480,000 students
cards.sub: Ministry classified buildings based on age damage and maintenance neglect

cards.big: Average age of high-risk buildings is 42 years with 180 dating pre-1970
cards.sub: Many constructed as temporary structures in continuous use for decades

cards.big: Ministry allocated only RM450 million for repairs against RM2.8 billion needed
cards.sub: At current funding the repair backlog would take 12 years to clear

cards.big: Selangor school ceiling collapse November 2025 injured 22 students
cards.sub: Building flagged in 2022 audit but repair not scheduled until 2027

cards.big: School safety tests whether children learning environment meets minimum structural standards
1,200 school structures at risk of failure. Children's safety cannot wait for the next budget cycle.
